title: Article 108. Military property--loss, damage, destruction, or wrongful disposition
doc_html:
§208.  Article 108.  Military property--loss, damage, destruction, or wrongful disposition

Any person subject to this code who, without proper authority:

(1)  sells or otherwise disposes of;

(2)  willfully or through neglect damages, destroys, or loses; or

(3)  willfully or through neglect suffers to be damaged, destroyed, sold, or wrongfully disposed of; any military property of the United States or of the state shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.  

Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.

Any person subject to this code who, without proper authority:

(3)  willfully or through neglect suffers to be damaged, destroyed, sold, or wrongfully disposed of; any military property of the United States or of the state shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
